title: trifolium absconditum
intro: Trifolium absconditum, also known as hidden trefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Trifolium absconditum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic. Trifolium absconditum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
